sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁחין

Transliteration: shechı̂yn

Phonetic: shekh-een'

BDB Definition:

  1. boil, inflamed spot, inflammation, eruption
    1. of man, leprosy, of man and beast

Origin: from an unused root probably meaning to burn

TWOT entry: 2364a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
